summary: The diff fully implements REQ-6. PaymentSection.tsx adds a generateUTEReference() function producing 'UTE-XXXXXXXX' format strings and calls it inside handlePaymentDone(), immediately invoking openWhatsAppPaymentConfirmation(uteRef) with no intermediate form step. The whatsapp.ts helper accepts the UTE reference and embeds it in the message along with the UPI ID and timestamp. The WhatsApp number remains 7439065260. All acceptance criteria are satisfied.
